build.buildCommand: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && if [ -f agent/pyproject.toml ]; then cd agent; fi; "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" sync --python 3.13 --frozen

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f agent/agent_yolo.py ]; then cd agent; fi; .venv/bin/python agent_yolo.py serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
